evals.prompt: Sell a covered call on AAPL.
evals.expected_output: A trade card with the call strike, premium, static return, annualized return, downside protection, called-away return, breakeven, and probability of assignment. Should use ~30 delta and 30-45 DTE by default. Should include a risk checklist.

assertions.name: trade_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains a formatted trade card showing the SELL call leg

assertions.name: has_call_strike
assertions.description: Response shows the specific call strike to sell with its premium

assertions.name: has_yield_metrics
assertions.description: Response includes static return, annualized return, and downside protection percentages

assertions.name: has_called_away_return
assertions.description: Response shows the called-away return (max return if assigned)

assertions.name: uses_default_30_delta
assertions.description: Response targets ~30 delta for the short call since no override was specified

assertions.name: has_risk_checklist
assertions.description: Response includes risk signals covering at least earnings and IV rank

evals.prompt: I want to sell a 15-delta call on MSFT. I want it to be very unlikely I get called away.
evals.expected_output: Trade card using 15-delta (not the default 30-delta) short call. Strike should be further OTM. Probability of assignment should be ~15%. Should acknowledge the conservative intent.

assertions.name: trade_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains a formatted trade card

assertions.name: respects_15_delta
assertions.description: Response uses 15-delta for the short call, not the default 30-delta

assertions.name: prob_called_near_15pct
assertions.description: Probability of assignment is stated as approximately 15%

assertions.name: acknowledges_conservative
assertions.description: Response acknowledges that the lower delta means less premium but lower chance of being called

assertions.name: has_yield_metrics
assertions.description: Response includes static return, annualized return, and downside protection

evals.prompt: Write a call on NVDA, I bought my shares at $150.
evals.expected_output: Trade card for NVDA covered call plus cost basis analysis showing effective cost basis after premium and called-away P&L relative to the $150 entry price.

assertions.name: trade_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains a formatted trade card for NVDA

assertions.name: shows_cost_basis_adjustment
assertions.description: Response shows the effective cost basis after subtracting the premium from the $150 entry

assertions.name: shows_called_away_pnl
assertions.description: Response calculates the P&L if shares are called away relative to the $150 cost basis

assertions.name: has_yield_metrics
assertions.description: Response includes static return and annualized return

assertions.name: has_risk_checklist
assertions.description: Response includes risk signals covering at least earnings
